User.title: User
User.description: A player's profile and personal best score.

uid.description: The user ID of the player.

displayName.description: The display name of the player.

photoURL.description: The avatar URL of the player.

personalBest.description: The highest score achieved by the player.

updatedAt.description: When the profile was last updated.

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles containing their personal best scores.
